steps.title: Identify what the task requires
steps.content: The student wants to “indicate how long John Cage's musical piece will last.” The correct choice must directly state the duration from the notes.

steps.title: Apply this requirement to the choices
steps.content: Choice C begins with “Lasting 639 years,” which directly conveys the duration and fulfills the stated goal. The other three choices focus on the composer, location, and instrument while omitting the duration entirely. That matches choice C — C is correct.
